message:
fix(auth): continue refreshing all providers on individual OAuth failure

Previously, refresh_all_expired_oauth_tokens() used the ? operator on
each individual token refresh, which would abort the entire loop on the
first failure — leaving remaining providers with expired tokens even if
their refreshes would have succeeded.

Now:
- Each refresh result is matched individually
- Successful refreshes are saved immediately with a warn on save failure
- Failed refreshes log a warning and collect the provider name
- After all providers are attempted, if any failed, return a single
  aggregate error listing all failed providers

This ensures maximum token coverage: a transient failure for one provider
doesn't block refresh of others.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
